title: CLAUDE.md
text: file provides guidance Claude Code (claude.ai/code) working code repository.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: csdata CRAN-published R package providing structural reference data Norway: population age/municipality, location hierarchies (ward/municipality/county/region), location names, redistricting mappings 2006 2024. data versioned geographic border year (2020 2024), controlled via csdata::config$border_nor.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: unit tests (tests/ directory exist). package relies R CMD check CI validation.
code: # Full R CMD check (same as CI) R CMD build . && R CMD check csdata_*.tar.gz --no-manual --as-cran  # Install locally for testing Rscript -e 'devtools::install()'  # Generate documentation from roxygen2 comments Rscript -e 'devtools::document()'  # Run package check via devtools Rscript -e 'devtools::check()'  # Build pkgdown site Rscript -e 'pkgdown::build_site()'

title: CLAUDE.md
text: GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/check--pkgdown.yml) runs push main/develop PRs main: 1. R-CMD-check ---manual ---cran 2. pkgdown site build deploy GitHub Pages (push main ) pushing, run gh run watch monitor CI.

what: Data flow: raw files -> internal datasets -> exported functions
title: CLAUDE.md
text: Raw source files data-raw/files/ — Excel/CSV files population data SSB, location spreadsheets, BA-region mappings Data-raw scripts (data-raw/01_*.R data-raw/04_*.R) — process raw files internal datasets, run numeric order Internal datasets stored R/sysdata.rda — named border year (e.g., nor_locations_hierarchy_b2020, nor_population_by_age_b2024) Exported accessor functions R/ — function takes border parameter retrieves corresponding internal dataset via get0(..., envir = asNamespace("csdata"))

title: CLAUDE.md
text: data-returning functions accept border = csdata::config$border_nor (default 2024). Internal datasets duplicated per border year (_b2020, _b2024). set_config(border_nor=) function changes package-wide default.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Location codes follow pattern {granularity}{number}: nation_nor, county_nor03, municip0301, wardoslo030101, baregion001, missingmunicip9999. prefix determines granularity_geo value.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: regenerate R/sysdata.rda, run data-raw/ scripts order. Intermediate results cached data-raw/data-temp/ .rds files. Population data fetched SSB via PxWebApiData package.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Package uses data.table throughout (dplyr). internal data manipulation uses data.table idioms: :=, setnames, setcolorder, copy(). S3 methods used location_code_to_* add_*_to_data_set functions, dispatching data.table vs default. Norwegian special characters accessed via nb helper list (nb$aa, nb$oe, nb$ae uppercase variants). Roxygen2 markdown enabled (Roxygen: list(markdown = TRUE)).

title: csdata
text: Valid locations (location types) available csdata::nor_locations_names(). Uncommon/internal use demarcated line text.

title: csdata
text: Ages coded characters always contain 3 digits. age range, two ages joined underscore (e.g. 005_010). Use 085p instead >=085 85+, allow easy conversion long wide formatted data. format help data easily sorted, kept right order, generate valid variable names converted wide-format. Missing ages coded “missing”.

title: csdata
text: Sex coded characters. Missing sexes coded “missing”.

title: Authors and Citation
text: package proudly brought : Richard Aubrey White. Author, maintainer. Chi Zhang. Author. See changelog contributors. 🙏

title: Authors and Citation
text: White RA, Zhang C (2021). csdata: Structural Data Norway. R package version 2026.3.30, https://niphr.github.io/csdata/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {csdata: Structural Data for Norway},   author = {Richard Aubrey White and Chi Zhang},   year = {2021},   note = {R package version 2026.3.30},   url = {https://niphr.github.io/csdata/}, }

title: Structural Data for Norway
text: csdata contains preformatted structural data Norway. Datasets relating population municipalities, municipality/county matching, different municipalities merged/redistricted time 2006 2024. Read introduction vignette run help(package="csdata").

title: Adds granularity_geo to a given data set — add_granularity_geo_to_data_set
code: library(data.table) #>  #> Attaching package: ‘data.table’ #> The following object is masked from ‘package:base’: #>  #>     %notin% data <- data.table(location_code = c("norge", "county03", "blah")) csdata::add_granularity_geo_to_data_set(data) print(data) #>    location_code granularity_geo #>           <char>          <char> #> 1:         norge          nation #> 2:      county03          county #> 3:          blah            blah  library(data.table) data <- data.table(location_code = c("norge", "county03", "blah")) csdata::add_granularity_geo_to_data_set(data, location_reference = csdata::nor_locations_names()) print(data) #>    location_code granularity_geo #>           <char>          <char> #> 1:         norge            <NA> #> 2:      county03            <NA> #> 3:          blah            <NA>

title: All names in Norway — nor_locations_names

title: Version 2026.3.30
text: CRAN release: 2026-03-31 Population data pipeline now fetches directly SSB PxWeb API (tables 07459 10826) instead manually downloaded CSV files. Including 2025 2026 population data. Municipality population data now uses actual historical data per municipality code instead crude split approximations merged municipalities. National population data sourced table 07459 (1986+), replacing defunct dataset 59322. Svalbard population data now fetched SSB table 07430 (2026), replacing static Excel file. Removed unused Nordic country population location Excel files.

text: location_name_file_nb_ascii csdata::nor_location_names now lowercase.
